text:
the birth of a female
child (1) The Moon, Venus and Mars in even Signs, (2)
conjunction of the Moon and Venus in the 5th or JOth house,
(3) their being in their own houses, (4) in their own Ariiias,
(5) Rahu being in the Lagna and being aspected by the Moon,
(6) the Moon being in the Lagna and aspected by Rahu, (7)
Venus being in the Hora of the Moon, and (8) Venus being in a
Kendra, (9) The Lagna, Sun, Moon and Jupiter in even Signs
and Amsas.
Birth of Twins;—When Mercury occupies the Ascendant which
is a dual Sign, or aspects such a Lagna, or when he is in the 10th,
twins will be born. The sex of the twins should be determined
from the nature of the Rasi and Arbia occupied by Mercury.
The idea is that if both the Sign and Am&a are odd RMis, both
will be males; if one is odd and the other even, one of the twins
will be male and the other female; and if both are even, both
will be females. 1 am giving here some more Yogas for the birth
